name: Truesight
entries: If you have Truesight, your vision is enhanced within a specified range. Within that range, your vision pierces through the following:

items.name: Darkness
entries: You can see in normal and magical {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}.

items.name: Invisibility
entries: You see creatures and objects that have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition.

items.name: Visual Illusions
entries: Visual illusions appear transparent to you, and you automatically succeed on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|saving throws} against them.

items.name: Transformations
entries: You discern the true form of any creature or object you see that has been transformed by magic.

items.name: Ethereal Plane
entries: You see into the Ethereal Plane.
